_note: ghidra runs as a shared HTTP daemon (systemd --user ghidra-opensummoners.service on :8202) so concurrent Claude sessions don't fight over the single-writer .gpr lock. See slopstudio docs/INFRA.md. Start/status: systemctl --user status ghidra-opensummoners. The live-probe game MCP (opensummoners) is added once tools/opensummoners_mcp.py is built + tested.
